prompt: Create a high-end studio product photo of a plush toy inspired by the Cheshire Cat, centered against a deep black background and seated on a matte black rectangular pedestal. The plush is made of soft velvety fabric in rich dark purple with deep teal-blue striped accents on the ears, forehead, arms, legs, and curled tail. It has a large rounded cat head, tall pointed ears with teal inner panels, oversized glossy black button-like eyes with bright catchlights, a tiny black nose, and an exaggerated wide crescent grin filled with warm cream-yellow rectangular teeth. The body is squat and cuddly with long floppy arms and legs, small paw pads on the feet, subtle stitched seams, and a teal ornamental flame-like emblem embroidered on the belly. The striped tail curls outward behind both sides of the pedestal. Use dramatic softbox lighting from the front-left, gentle rim highlights, realistic plush fibers, visible stitching, tactile fabric texture, shallow depth of field, symmetrical composition, dark whimsical fantasy mood, ultra-detailed commercial toy photography, square image.
